reason: At desktop viewport 1440x900, the left-panel sections appear in required vertical order (Token header → Price display → Chart → Stats → About → Transactions), and the swap widget is present in the right panel.

assertionResults.title: Full page renders all sections in correct order
assertionResults.reason: DOM position evidence confirms strictly increasing Y positions for all required left-panel sections, and the right panel contains a visible swap widget.
observations: Measured Y positions (top): tokenHeader=181, priceDisplay=248, chart=482, stats=728, about=971, transactions=1223.
Right panel evidence: swap tab at left=929 and Connect Wallet CTA at left=929 in a 1440px-wide viewport (right-column placement).
Chart section rendered with fallback message ('Unable to load chart data') due API rate limiting, but required section presence/order remained intact.

steps.action: Open http://localhost:3102 and set viewport to 1440x900
steps.expected: Desktop two-column layout with full token detail page
steps.observed: Page rendered with left content column and right swap widget column

steps.expected: Visual proof of section order and right-panel swap widget
steps.observed: All required sections visible in order on full-page capture; swap widget visible in right panel

steps.action: Run DOM geometry extraction for required section anchors
steps.expected: Monotonic top positions matching required order
steps.observed: Order check returned inOrder=true with strictly increasing top coordinates

steps.expected: No blocking errors for layout assertion
steps.observed: Repeated 429 Too Many Requests logs (72 lines), causing chart data fallback only

frictions.description: API responses were rate-limited (HTTP 429), producing repeated browser console errors and chart-data fallback messaging during validation.
frictions.resolution: No disruptive infra changes attempted per isolation rules; continued with layout/order validation using rendered UI and DOM geometry evidence.

summary: CROSS-001 passed: required left-panel section order is correct and swap widget is present in right panel at desktop viewport. Non-blocking friction: repeated API 429 console errors affected chart data loading only.
